title: ARC 1: DEAD RECKONING
subtitle: The universe doesn't care if you live or die. That's the good news.

active_mission.title: Salvage Operation: MSV Carrion Star
active_mission.objective: Recover the sealed container, nav core, and personal effects crate while preventing Hollow entities from boarding the Leviathan.

intel_warning: Hollow entities remain active aboard the Carrion Star. Cole confirms the sealed container is chained in cargo bay midships, starboard stack. Drone Eye-1 is presumed lost after synchronized hostile response.

progression.title: Boarding the Leviathan
progression.summary: Mission start aboard the Leviathan: VEGA brings the crew online, Echo is introduced as the fourth operator, and the team aligns on approach vectors and role hooks before moving out.

progression.title: The Call (Mira Vex)
progression.summary: Draven locks in stronger terms with Mira Vex, Church relay traffic flags the exchange, and the Leviathan completes a defensive resupply package before departure.

progression.title: Contact: Carrion Star
progression.summary: The Leviathan approaches the derelict and deploys drone reconnaissance; Renner appears on comms with inconsistent signals, forcing the crew to commit to a direct boarding decision.

progression.title: Boarding & Extraction
progression.summary: Inside the ship, the team hits synchronized hostile pulses, confronts Jace Cole's demand for passage, executes System Hijack under pressure, loses drone support behind a sealing bulkhead, and extracts Cole alive.
